phases.name: Phase 1: Reconnaissance & OSINT
phases.description: Master the art of information gathering. Learn passive and active reconnaissance techniques used by top bug bounty hunters.

modules.title: DNS Fundamentals
modules.description: Understanding DNS records, zone transfers, and DNS enumeration for target mapping

modules.title: Subdomain Enumeration
modules.description: Discover subdomains using passive and active techniques with multiple tools

modules.title: Port Scanning with Nmap
modules.description: Master Nmap scanning techniques, NSE scripts, and scan optimization

modules.title: Google Dorking
modules.description: Advanced Google search operators for finding sensitive information and exposed assets

modules.title: Shodan Reconnaissance
modules.description: Use Shodan for discovering internet-facing assets, services, and vulnerabilities

modules.title: OSINT Framework
modules.description: Open Source Intelligence gathering using social media, public records, and data breaches

modules.title: Technology Fingerprinting
modules.description: Identify web technologies, frameworks, CMS, and server configurations

modules.title: Content Discovery
modules.description: Find hidden files, directories, and endpoints using fuzzing tools

modules.title: Wayback Machine & Archives
modules.description: Use web archives to find old endpoints, parameters, and sensitive data

modules.title: GitHub Recon
modules.description: Find secrets, API keys, and sensitive data in public GitHub repositories

modules.title: ASN & IP Range Discovery
modules.description: Map organization IP ranges using ASN lookups and BGP data

modules.title: Certificate Transparency
modules.description: Use CT logs to discover subdomains and monitor certificate issuance

modules.title: JavaScript Analysis
modules.description: Extract endpoints, secrets, and API keys from JavaScript files

modules.title: Scope Management
modules.description: Define and manage bug bounty scope, out-of-scope handling, and asset inventory

modules.title: Recon Automation
modules.description: Build automated recon pipelines combining multiple tools and notifications

modules.title: Email Harvesting
modules.description: Collect email addresses for phishing and credential stuffing reconnaissance

modules.title: WHOIS & Domain Intelligence
modules.description: Extract domain registration data, nameservers, and ownership information

modules.title: Cloud Asset Discovery
modules.description: Find organization's cloud assets on AWS, Azure, GCP using specific techniques

modules.title: Wireless Reconnaissance
modules.description: Discover wireless networks, identify targets, and map wireless infrastructure

modules.title: Dark Web Intelligence
modules.description: Introduction to dark web OSINT and monitoring threat actor communications

modules.title: Social Engineering Recon
modules.description: Gather human intelligence through LinkedIn, social media, and public profiles

modules.title: API Endpoint Discovery
modules.description: Find undocumented API endpoints through fuzzing, JS analysis, and documentation

modules.title: Mobile App Recon
modules.description: Extract API endpoints and secrets from mobile application packages

modules.title: Favicon Hash Recon
modules.description: Use favicon hashes to discover related infrastructure on Shodan

modules.title: Virtual Host Discovery
modules.description: Find virtual hosts and hidden domains on shared IP addresses

phases.name: Phase 2: Web Application Attacks
phases.description: Deep dive into common and critical web vulnerabilities. Learn exploitation techniques for OWASP Top 10 and beyond.

modules.title: XSS - Reflected
modules.description: Find and exploit reflected cross-site scripting with various payloads and contexts

modules.title: XSS - Stored
modules.description: Persistent XSS exploitation, payload crafting, and impact demonstration

modules.title: XSS - DOM-based
modules.description: Client-side XSS through DOM manipulation, sources and sinks analysis

modules.title: XSS Filter Bypass
modules.description: Bypass WAF, CSP, and input filters using encoding and mutation techniques

modules.title: SQL Injection - Union Based
modules.description: Extract data using UNION-based SQL injection technique

modules.title: SQL Injection - Error Based
modules.description: Leverage database errors to extract information

modules.title: SQL Injection - Blind (Boolean)
modules.description: Boolean-based blind SQL injection for data extraction

modules.title: SQL Injection - Blind (Time)
modules.description: Time-based blind SQL injection using sleep and benchmark

modules.title: SQL Injection - Second Order
modules.description: Exploit stored SQL injection triggered in different contexts

modules.title: SQL Injection Automation
modules.description: Automate SQLi with sqlmap - tamper scripts, techniques, and optimization

modules.title: CSRF Attacks
modules.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery exploitation and token bypass techniques

modules.title: SSRF - Basic
modules.description: Server-Side Request Forgery to access internal services and cloud metadata

modules.title: SSRF - Blind
modules.description: Blind SSRF exploitation using out-of-band techniques

modules.title: IDOR Exploitation
modules.description: Insecure Direct Object Reference for unauthorized data access

modules.title: File Upload Vulnerabilities
modules.description: Bypass upload restrictions for webshell deployment and RCE

modules.title: Command Injection
modules.description: OS command injection through various input vectors

modules.title: XXE - XML External Entities
modules.description: XXE attacks for file reading, SSRF, and data exfiltration

modules.title: Insecure Deserialization
modules.description: Exploit deserialization flaws in Java, PHP, Python, and .NET

modules.title: Local File Inclusion (LFI)
modules.description: LFI to read sensitive files and escalate to RCE

modules.title: Remote File Inclusion (RFI)
modules.description: Include external files for remote code execution

modules.title: Open Redirect
modules.description: Exploit open redirects for phishing and chaining with other vulns

modules.title: Clickjacking
modules.description: UI redressing attacks and frame-based exploitation

modules.title: HTTP Request Smuggling
modules.description: CL.TE and TE.CL request smuggling for cache poisoning

modules.title: CORS Misconfiguration
modules.description: Exploit permissive CORS policies to steal sensitive data cross-origin

modules.title: CRLF Injection
modules.description: Header injection through CRLF characters for session fixation

modules.title: Host Header Injection
modules.description: Exploiting host header for password reset poisoning and cache attacks

modules.title: LDAP Injection
modules.description: LDAP query manipulation for authentication bypass and data extraction

modules.title: NoSQL Injection
modules.description: MongoDB and other NoSQL database injection techniques

modules.title: XPATH Injection
modules.description: Exploit XPATH queries in XML-based authentication

modules.title: Template Injection (SSTI)
modules.description: Server-Side Template Injection for RCE in Jinja2, Twig, and more

modules.title: Web Cache Poisoning
modules.description: Poison web caches to serve malicious content to other users

modules.title: Web Cache Deception
modules.description: Trick caches into storing sensitive user-specific content

modules.title: HTTP Parameter Pollution
modules.description: Exploit parameter handling differences between servers

modules.title: Mass Assignment
modules.description: Exploit mass assignment to modify unauthorized object properties

modules.title: Subdomain Takeover
modules.description: Claim dangling DNS records pointing to deprovisioned services

phases.name: Phase 3: Advanced Techniques
phases.description: Master advanced exploitation techniques, modern attack vectors, and complex vulnerability chains used in high-paying bounties.

modules.title: OAuth 2.0 Attacks
modules.description: Exploit OAuth flows: redirect_uri manipulation, state bypass, token leakage

modules.title: JWT Security
modules.description: JWT none algorithm, key confusion, header injection, and JWK attacks

modules.title: GraphQL Hacking
modules.description: Introspection, injection, batching attacks, and authorization bypass

modules.title: WebSocket Attacks
modules.description: Cross-site WebSocket hijacking and message manipulation

modules.title: Race Conditions
modules.description: Exploit TOCTOU flaws using single-packet attack technique

modules.title: Prototype Pollution
modules.description: Client-side and server-side prototype pollution for XSS and RCE

modules.title: SSTI Advanced
modules.description: Advanced template injection in various engines with sandbox escape

modules.title: Dependency Confusion
modules.description: Supply chain attacks through package manager confusion

modules.title: SAML Attacks
modules.description: SAML signature wrapping, replay attacks, and assertion manipulation

modules.title: API Security Testing
modules.description: Comprehensive API pentesting: REST, GraphQL, gRPC, and WebSocket

modules.title: 2FA Bypass Techniques
modules.description: Bypass two-factor authentication through logic flaws and brute force

modules.title: Password Reset Flaws
modules.description: Exploit password reset mechanisms through token manipulation and poisoning

modules.title: Account Takeover Chains
modules.description: Chain multiple vulnerabilities for full account takeover

modules.title: SSRF to RCE
modules.description: Escalate SSRF to remote code execution through cloud metadata and internal services

modules.title: Deserialization Chains
modules.description: Build complex gadget chains for advanced deserialization exploitation

modules.title: Container Escapes
modules.description: Escape Docker containers to access the host system

modules.title: Kubernetes Attacks
modules.description: Exploit Kubernetes misconfigurations for cluster compromise

modules.title: Cloud Security (AWS)
modules.description: AWS-specific attacks: S3, Lambda, IAM, EC2 metadata exploitation

modules.title: Cloud Security (Azure)
modules.description: Azure AD attacks, managed identity abuse, and storage exploitation

modules.title: Browser-Based Attacks
modules.description: Advanced browser exploitation: postMessage, service workers, and cache API

modules.title: HTTP/2 & HTTP/3 Attacks
modules.description: Protocol-specific attacks in HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 environments

modules.title: DNS Rebinding
modules.description: Bypass same-origin policy using DNS rebinding techniques

modules.title: PDF & Document Injection
modules.description: Exploit PDF generation for SSRF, XSS, and data exfiltration

modules.title: SVG-Based Attacks
modules.description: Use SVG files for XSS, SSRF, and CSP bypass

modules.title: Edge Side Include (ESI) Injection
modules.description: Exploit ESI gateways for SSRF and XSS at the cache level

phases.name: Phase 4: Bug Bounty Professional
phases.description: Turn your skills into bounties. Learn professional methodologies, report writing, automation, and career strategies.

modules.title: Choosing Bug Bounty Programs
modules.description: Select programs based on scope, payout, and competition analysis

modules.title: Bug Bounty Methodology
modules.description: Develop a systematic approach to finding vulnerabilities consistently

modules.title: Report Writing Mastery
modules.description: Write clear, impactful reports that maximize bounty payouts

modules.title: CVSS Scoring
modules.description: Understand and apply CVSS scoring for accurate severity assessment

modules.title: Triaging & Communication
modules.description: Effective communication with security teams during triage process

modules.title: Recon Pipeline Building
modules.description: Automate your entire recon workflow with shell scripts and cron jobs

modules.title: Nuclei Template Writing
modules.description: Create custom Nuclei templates for automated vulnerability scanning

modules.title: Custom Wordlist Generation
modules.description: Generate targeted wordlists from target-specific data sources

modules.title: Burp Suite Advanced
modules.description: Master Burp Suite extensions, macros, and advanced scanning

modules.title: Browser DevTools Hacking
modules.description: Use Chrome DevTools for security testing and debugging

modules.title: Mobile Bug Bounty
modules.description: Bug bounty hunting in Android and iOS applications

modules.title: Smart Contract Auditing
modules.description: Audit smart contracts for common vulnerabilities and logic flaws

modules.title: Full-Stack Web Testing
modules.description: Test modern full-stack applications: React, Angular, Next.js, GraphQL

modules.title: Chaining Vulnerabilities
modules.description: Combine low-severity bugs into high-impact exploit chains

modules.title: Bug Bounty Tax & Legal
modules.description: Understanding tax obligations, legal considerations, and safe harbor

modules.title: Platform Strategies
modules.description: Maximize earnings on HackerOne, Bugcrowd, Intigriti, and others

modules.title: Continuous Learning Plan
modules.description: Stay updated with new vulnerabilities, CVEs, and research papers

modules.title: Building Your Toolkit
modules.description: Curate and maintain a personal hacking toolkit for efficiency

modules.title: Responsible Disclosure
modules.description: Ethics, responsible disclosure policies, and coordinated disclosure

modules.title: Bug Bounty Portfolio
modules.description: Build a portfolio showcasing your skills, write-ups, and achievements
